ddls:
CREATE TABLE "games" (
  "game_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each game */,
  "game_name" TEXT /* Name of the game (e.g., Pacific Northwest Highland Games) */,
  "game_date" TEXT /* Date the game was held */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the game */,
  "game_type" TEXT /* Type of game (e.g., championship, regional) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("game_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "disciplines" (
  "discipline_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each discipline */,
  "discipline_name" TEXT /* Name of the discipline */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the discipline */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("discipline_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "grades" (
  "grade_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each grade */,
  "grade_name" TEXT /* Name of the grade */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the grade */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("grade_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "events" (
  "event_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each event */,
  "event_name" TEXT /* Name of the event */,
  "discipline_id" INTEGER /* ID of the discipline the event belongs to */,
  "grade_id" INTEGER /* ID of the grade the event belongs to */,
  "event_type" TEXT /* Type of event (e.g., solo, group) */,
  "rules" TEXT /* Rules for the event */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("event_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_events_grade_id FOREIGN KEY ("grade_id") REFERENCES grades ("grade_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_events_discipline_id FOREIGN KEY ("discipline_id") REFERENCES disciplines ("discipline_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "competitors" (
  "competitor_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each competitor */,
  "competitor_name" TEXT /* Name of the competitor */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the competitor */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the competitor */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the competitor */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("competitor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "adjudicators" (
  "adjudicator_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each adjudicator */,
  "adjudicator_name" TEXT /* Name of the adjudicator */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the adjudicator */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the adjudicator */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the adjudicator */,
  "bio" TEXT /* Biography of the adjudicator */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("adjudicator_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "results" (
  "result_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each result */,
  "event_id" INTEGER /* ID of the event the result is for */,
  "competitor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the competitor the result is for */,
  "placing" INTEGER /* Placing of the competitor in the event */,
  "adjudicator_id" INTEGER /* ID of the adjudicator who judged the event */,
  "score" TEXT /* Score of the competitor in the event */,
  "feedback" TEXT /* Feedback from the adjudicator */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("result_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_results_competitor_id FOREIGN KEY ("competitor_id") REFERENCES competitors ("competitor_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_results_adjudicator_id FOREIGN KEY ("adjudicator_id") REFERENCES adjudicators ("adjudicator_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_results_event_id FOREIGN KEY ("event_id") REFERENCES events ("event_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "games_events" (
  "game_event_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each game-event */,
  "game_id" INTEGER /* ID of the game the event was held at */,
  "event_id" INTEGER /* ID of the event held at the game */,
  "event_num" TEXT /* Event number (e.g., 111A) */,
  "start_time" TEXT /* Start time of the event */,
  "end_time" TEXT /* End time of the event */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("game_event_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_games_events_game_id FOREIGN KEY ("game_id") REFERENCES games ("game_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_games_events_event_id FOREIGN KEY ("event_id") REFERENCES events ("event_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "event_entries" (
  "entry_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each entry */,
  "event_id" INTEGER /* ID of the event the entry is for */,
  "competitor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the competitor the entry is for */,
  "number_that_played" INTEGER /* Number of competitors who played in the event */,
  "entry_status" TEXT /* Status of the entry (e.g., confirmed, withdrawn) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("entry_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_event_entries_event_id FOREIGN KEY ("event_id") REFERENCES events ("event_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_event_entries_competitor_id FOREIGN KEY ("competitor_id") REFERENCES competitors ("competitor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., competitor, adjudicator, administrator) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hash of the user's password */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id", "role_id")
)
column_names: Name of the game (e.g., Pacific Northwest Highland Games)
ID of the discipline the event belongs to
ID of the grade the event belongs to
ID of the event the result is for
ID of the competitor the result is for
Placing of the competitor in the event
ID of the adjudicator who judged the event
Score of the competitor in the event
ID of the game the event was held at

Number of competitors who played in the event
Status of the entry (e.g., confirmed, withdrawn)
Role of the user (e.g., competitor, adjudicator, administrator)
